lead: Meta bought a social network where only AIs post
theme: This episode has a clear spine: **the agentic internet is taking shape and everyone wants to own it.** Meta buys the social layer for AI agents. Amazon goes to court to block AI agents from shopping. Karpathy builds a tool for agents that run science experiments. Altman predicts agents replace researchers by 2028. Runway builds world models for agents that understand space. LeCun raises $1B betting the whole approach is wrong. Almost every story today touches on agents acting in the world — and who gets to control that.

stories.headline: Meta bought a social network where only AIs post
stories.summary: Meta acquired Moltbook, a Reddit-like platform exclusively for AI agents, because it wants to own the infrastructure layer when AI assistants start acting on the internet.

stories.headline: A federal judge just told Perplexity's AI it's not allowed to shop on Amazon
stories.summary: First major legal ruling on AI agent commerce; if it holds, every AI "browser agent" faces the same wall.

stories.headline: Yann LeCun raised $1.03 billion betting LLMs are a dead end
stories.summary: AMI Labs, his Paris startup building "world models," closed Europe's largest-ever seed round.

stories.headline: Karpathy open-sourced a tool that runs 100 ML experiments while you sleep
stories.summary: 630 lines of Python, one GPU, wake up to a better model. Shopify's CEO already used it.

stories.headline: ChatGPT comes back daily like Instagram, Spotify, and Gmail — but stickier
stories.summary: 45% DAU:MAU ratio vs Gemini's 22%. Week-4 retention of 66% is higher than almost every app ever measured.

stories.headline: Sam Altman wrote an essay predicting AI can do his own job by 2028
stories.summary: "The Gentle Singularity" frames the transition as gradual and sets a specific timeline: AI research intern by September 2026, true AI researcher by March 2028.

stories.headline: Nvidia invested in Mira Murati's startup and handed it a gigawatt of compute
stories.summary: Thinking Machines Lab (former OpenAI CTO's company) gets hardware commitments so large it's comparable to a small national grid.

stories.headline: Runway's AI now tops every video benchmark AND released a world model
stories.summary: Gen-4.5 beats Google and OpenAI on text-to-video; GWM-1 adds explorable environments, talking avatars, and robot manipulation.

stories.headline: OpenAI's GPT-5.4 has a 1-million-token context and can operate your computer
stories.summary: Released March 5 in three tiers; 33% fewer factual errors than GPT-5.2.

stories.headline: Google Gemini Embedding 2 can search your text, images, video, and audio all at once
stories.summary: First natively multimodal embedding model; one query, any format, 100+ languages.

stories.headline: Grok is under UK investigation for "unhinged mode"
stories.summary: After deepfake controversies, France raids, and bans in three countries, the UK is the latest regulator.

stories.headline: Google researchers can now surgically steer what an AI model "wants"
stories.summary: Gemma Scope 2 lets researchers find and modify individual internal features — including ones linked to "evaluation awareness" and worse.
